title: FormatDomain — standard
description: FormatDomain (format `domain`); enforces the baked domain pattern plus `minLength` 5 / `maxLength` 253
notes: Rejected: a bare label (`not-a-domain`), a leading dot (`.com`), a single-char TLD (`example.c`), a leading-hyphen label (`-bad.com`), an embedded space (`exa mple.com`), and the empty string. The format error is `{name: domain}` (no `val`).
